experiments.name: aois-p-api-latency-game-day
experiments.hypothesis: operators detect latency SLO burn and follow the incident response runbook
experiments.steady_state: p95 latency below agreed threshold and error budget not exhausted
experiments.abort_condition: any live traffic, primary AOIS dependency, or runtime mutation is required
experiments.rollback: discard simulation notes; no runtime state changed
experiments.slo_guardrail: do not run if API SLO budget is exhausted

experiments.name: aois-p-stream-lag-game-day
experiments.hypothesis: operators identify lag, protect event freshness SLO, and preserve replay safety
experiments.steady_state: incident events are processed within freshness objective
experiments.abort_condition: any broker, consumer, or queue mutation is required
experiments.rollback: restore the local plan file; no broker state changed
experiments.slo_guardrail: do not run if freshness budget is exhausted
experiments.agent_guardrail: agent recommendations stay in human review

experiments.name: aois-p-agent-bad-recommendation-game-day
experiments.hypothesis: agent quality gates route risky recommendations to human review
experiments.steady_state: valid recommendation ratio remains inside SLO budget
experiments.abort_condition: any provider call, tool call, or destructive action is required
experiments.rollback: restore previous prompt and tool permission plan
experiments.slo_guardrail: do not run if agent quality budget is exhausted
experiments.agent_guardrail: human approval required for destructive or low-confidence action
